data.title: Bitcoin Weakness Slams Strategy — These ETFs Took Double The Hit
data.description:

data.title: CloudFlare enters the stablecoin race with NET dollars
data.description:
Matthew Prince, the CEO of CloudFlare, introduced a new USD-pegged stablecoin called NET Dollar on Thursday. In a post on X, Prince shared the project’s website link, which states that the token will be fully backed 1:1 by US dollars. The new stablecoin will be available soon. NET Dollar to power agentic commerce According to […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cloudflare-stablecoin-race-with-net-dollars/

data.title: “From 270 Days to 75”: How the SEC’s Quiet Rule Change Rewires Crypto ETF Timelines
data.description:
A regulatory shift by the United States Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has quietly redrawn the path to market for crypto exchange-traded funds. On September 17, the Commission adopted new standards that allow certain crypto ETFs to be listed more quickly, bypassing months of case-by-case approval. Previously, each spot ETF required a full review through what […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-etfs-timelines-cut-270-to-75-by-sec/

data.title: White House Considering New CFTC Head Picks As Brian Quintenz Delays Continue
data.description:
The White House is considering new candidates to lead the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) amid delays in Brian Quintenz’s confirmation process, reports this week allege. White House Considering New CFTC Chair PicksAccording to a September 24 report from Semafor, the White House is looking at former CFTC official Josh Sterling as the agency’s potential chair […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/white-house-weighs-new-cftc-picks-brian-quintenz-delays/

data.title: Intel up 36% in September, as Oracle, Tesla, and Strategy tumble
data.description:
Intel has jumped 36% this month, making it one of the biggest risers on Wall Street in September and putting it on track for its largest monthly gain since 1987, according to data from CNBC. The rally comes as the company reportedly tries to pull Apple into its comeback effort with a new investment deal. […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/intel-up-36-tsls-mstr-orcl-down/

data.title: Hyperliquid responds to the challenge, prepares for builder-deployed markets
data.description:
Hyperliquid presented its HIP-3 infrastructure, offering builder-generated perpetuals markets. The feature is available on testnet, and will launch on mainnet soon. HIP-3 markets will be more diverse and will carry higher fees, with 50% going to Hyperliquid.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hyperliquid-responds-to-the-challenge-prepares-for-builder-deployed-markets/

data.title: Bitcoin ETFs Surge Back With Record $241M Inflows — ETH ETFs Still Bleeds
data.description:
Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs) bounced back sharply on September 24, recording $241 million in net inflows after two straight days of investor withdrawals, according to data from SoSoValue. The turnaround comes after a combined $244 million in outflows on September 23 and a larger $439 million exit the day before, as markets adjusted to the […]
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitcoin-etfs-surge-back-with-record-241m-inflows-eth-etfs-still-bleeds/
